title: Protein-Packed Mediterranean Beef Bake
description: A hearty, Mediterranean-inspired baked beef dish packed with protein and fresh herbs, perfect for a post-workout meal.
instructions: In a large skillet over medium-high heat, drizzle 1 tbsp olive oil and brown the ground beef until no pink remains, about 5 minutes. Transfer to a bowl.
Add the remaining 1 tbsp olive oil to the skillet, then sear the cubed sirloin on all sides until just browned, about 3 minutes per side. Remove and set aside.
Add diced onion and sliced bell pepper to the skillet; sauté until softened, about 4 minutes.
Stir in minced garlic and cook for 1 minute until fragrant.
In a large baking dish, combine browned ground beef, seared sirloin, sautéed onion and pepper, halved cherry tomatoes, sliced olives, chopped parsley, oregano, salt, and pepper. Toss gently to mix.
Drizzle with olive oil and stir to coat evenly.
Cover the dish with foil and bake in the preheated oven for 35 minutes.
Remove the foil, bake another 10 minutes to crisp the edges, then let rest 5 minutes before serving.
Cook ground beef to an internal temperature of 71°C / 160°F (no longer pink in the middle) before serving.
